feature_request: I want to manage my todos. You can save the todos in memory. You don't need to create a database.
last_feedback: Fresh repair attempt. Use only this feedback plus the handoff context; do not rely on prior tool history. Tests failed: # Test Report Status: failed Command: `python3 -m pytest /tests -q --junitxml=/tests/test-results.xml` Exit code: 1 Counts: 4 tests, 2 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped ## Pytest Output ```text F.F. [100%] ======================================== FAILURES ========================================= ______________________________________ test_add_todo ______________________________________ def test_add_todo(): """Criteria 1 & 2 & 4: page has input+button; submitting adds task to visible list; stored in memory.""" # Criterion 1: GET / displays input field and submit button html = _get() assert 'id="todo-input"' in html, "Input field missing" assert 'type="submit"' in html, "Submit button missing" # Criterion 2 & 4: POST adds task to visible li ...[truncated]... riterion 2: completed todos visually distinguished (strikethrough + dimmed) > assert 'class="todo-item completed"' in html_toggle, \ "Completed class not applied after toggle" E AssertionError: Completed class not applied after toggle E assert 'class="todo-item completed"' in '\n\n\n\n', '>')) m = re.search( rf'data-id="(\d+)"[^>]*>.*?todo-text">{re.escape(escaped)}', html, re.DOTALL) return int(m.group(1)) if m else None def _get_todo_text(html, tid): """Extract the rendered text for a specific todo id.""" m = re.search( rf'data-id="{tid}"[^>]*>.*?todo-text">(.*?)', html, re.DOTALL) return m.group(1) if m else None def test_toggle_completion_and_visual_styling(): """Criteria 1 & 2: Checkbox toggle + strikethrough/dimmed styling.""" TEXT = 'US003_TOGGLE_TASK' ...[truncated]... "Strikethrough styling missing on completed todo" # Criterion 4: updates persist only for current session (in-memory) html_get = _get() assert f'data-id="{tid}"' in html_get and 'completed' in html_get, \ "Completion status not persisted in server state" def test_edit_todo_text(): """Criteria 3 & 4: Edit text reflects immediately + persists.""" ORIGINAL = 'US003_EDIT_ORIGINAL' UPDATED = 'US003_EDIT_UPDATED' # Add a unique todo add_data = urllib.parse.urlencode({'task': ORIGINAL}) html_add = _post('/', add_data) tid = _find_id(html_add, ORIGINAL) assert tid is not None, "Todo was not added" # Edit the text via /edit endpoint edit_data = urllib.parse.urlencode({'id': str(tid), 'text': UPDATED}) html_edit = _post('/edit', edit_data) # Criterion 3: changes reflect immediately upon saving (check specific todo) rendered = _get_todo_text(html_edit, tid) assert rendered == UPDATED, f"Edited text not reflected; got '{rendered}'" # Criterion 4: persists in server memory (verify via GET) html_get = _get() persisted = _get_todo_text(html_get, tid) assert persisted == UPDATED, f"Edit not persisted in server state; got '{persisted}'"
